description: Resource is a consumer's instantiation of a kind.

dependencies.description:
Other resources this one depends on. Each entry triggers the target
 kind's `dependent` hook(s) against this resource's bundle during
 render. See SPEC.md "Dependencies".

items.description:
Dependency declares that this resource depends on another resource.
 The depended-on resource (target) authoritatively controls how this
 resource talks to it via the target's `dependent` hooks.

kind.description: The kind of the target resource.

name.description:
The name of the target resource. The pair (kind, name) must resolve
 to a resource in the catalog at render time.

params.description:
Arbitrary parameters the target's `dependent` hook receives. The
 shape is defined by the target kind's matching dependents entry.
params.title: Struct

items.title: Dependency

metadata.description: Standard metadata common to all resources.

kind.description:
The name of the kind this resource instantiates. Must match a kind
 present in one of the loaded registries.

overlays.description: Conditional overlays applied based on CEL expressions.

items.description: Overlay is a conditional data merge applied before transforms.

file.description:
Path to the overlay file. Resolved relative to the resource file
 that declares this overlay, or used as-is when absolute.

match.description: CEL expression evaluated against the render context.

items.title: Overlay

overrides.description: Source files that have been ejected for local override.

items.description: Override maps a kind source file to a local replacement.

path.description: Local path to the override file.

source.description: Path of the source file in the kind being replaced.

items.title: Override

metadata.title: Metadata

spec.description: Resource-specific data validated against the kind's schema.
spec.title: Struct

title: Resource
